# ng-blatui

> Accessible Angular UI library (Angular 21 & 22, standalone, signals, zoneless, SSR-ready) ported from BlatUI. Components, blocks, charts and ready-made page templates, themed with Tailwind CSS v4 + oklch design tokens.

ng-blatui is an Angular port of BlatUI. Install with `npm i ng-blatui`, import any component from the `ng-blatui` barrel (selectors are prefixed `bui`), and theme it with Tailwind v4 + oklch tokens. Every component is standalone, signal-based, zoneless and SSR-safe. Each page below is server-prerendered, so its full markup, props and code are fetchable as plain HTML.

- Docs & live demo: https://ngblatui.remix-it.com
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/ng-blatui
- Machine-readable registry: https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/registry.json
- MCP server: `npx ng-blatui-mcp` (see https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/docs/installation)

## Getting started

- [Introduction](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/)
- [Installation](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/docs/installation)
- [Theming](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/docs/theming)

## Components (154)

### Forms & Input

- [Button](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/components/button) — props: variant, size · types: ButtonSize, ButtonVariant
- [Input](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/components/input) — props: size
- [Textarea](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/components/textarea) — props: size, maxRows
- [Label](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/components/label)
- [Checkbox](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/components/checkbox) — props: tone · two-way: checked, indeterminate, disabled
- [Switch](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/components/switch) — props: size, iconOn, iconOff · two-way: checked, disabled
- [Radio Group](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/components/radio-group) — props: value, disabled · two-way: value, disabled
- [Button Group](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/components/button-group) — props: orientation
- [Field](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/components/field) — props: orientation, for, variant
- [Toggle](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/components/toggle) — props: variant, size · two-way: pressed, disabled
- [Copy Button](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/components/copy-button) — props: value, label
- [Input Group](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/components/input-group) — props: align, variant, size
- [Slider](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/components/slider) — props: range, min, max, step, orientation, ariaLabel · two-way: value, endValue, disabled
- [Rating](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/components/rating) — props: max, readonly, size, color, ariaLabel · two-way: value, disabled
- [Autosize Textarea](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/components/autosize-textarea)
- [Segmented Control](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/components/segmented-control) — props: options · two-way: value, disabled · types: SegmentOption

- [Combobox](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/components/combobox) — props: multiple, options, placeholder, searchable · two-way: value, values, disabled · types: ComboboxOption

- [Editable](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/components/editable) — props: placeholder, label, multiline · two-way: value
- [Knob](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/components/knob) — props: min, max, step, size, label · two-way: value, disabled
- [Input OTP](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/components/input-otp) — props: maxlength, alphanumeric, groupSize, ariaLabel · two-way: value, disabled
- [Phone Input](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/components/phone-input) — props: name, id, placeholder, countryLabel, numberLabel · two-way: value, country
- [Color Picker](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/components/color-picker) — props: swatches, disabled, pickLabel, hexLabel · two-way: value
- [Signature Pad](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/components/signature-pad) — props: height, penColor
- [Repeater](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/components/repeater) — props: fields, min, max, addLabel, removeLabel · two-way: rows · types: RepeaterField
- [Markdown Editor](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/components/markdown-editor) — props: name, placeholder, rows · two-way: value

- [Autocomplete](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/components/autocomplete) — props: multiple, options, placeholder, empty, name, size, icon · two-way: value, values, disabled · types: AutocompleteSize
- [File Upload](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/components/file-upload) — props: multiple, accept, name, hint, disabled, dropzoneLabel, removeLabel · emits: filesChange
- [Input Mask](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/components/input-mask) — props: mask, placeholder, inputmode, name · two-way: value, disabled
- [Mention Input](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/components/mention-input) — props: mentions, trigger, placeholder, rows, name · two-way: value · types: Mention
- [Rich Text Editor](https://ngblatui.remix-it.com/components/rich-text-editor) — props: placeholder, ariaLabel, formattingLabel, name · two-way: value
